---
title: "Boosted regression trees"
subtitle: "Building on what the model gets wrong"
author: "Grant Vagle, Jeremiah Shrovnal, Lynn Waterhouse"
institute: 
output:
  xaringan::moon_reader:
    lib_dir: libs
    nature:
      highlightStyle: github
      highlightLines: true
      countIncrementalSlides: false
---

# Overview of this session

- Boosted regression trees (aka gradient boosted models)

  - Overview of the algorithm
  
  - Tuning parameters, grid search tuning, the "art" of model tuning
  
  - Other "boosted" models
  
- Deeper model interpretation
  
  - SHAP values - brief explainer and examples
  
  - Point to other interpretation methods
  
- Show teaching example

- Hands-on coding example(s)

---
